name: Integration - Snyk Test and Fix Generation Workflow
description: Tests the integration between SnykIntegration, FixGenerator, and LLMService by running the process_repository method with a valid repo and tokens.
input: Call AgentOrchestrator.process_repository with valid repo_url, github_access_token, and snyk_api_token.
output: Dictionary with success=True and a report string containing both pre-fix and post-fix Snyk results.
success_criteria: Report includes both 'Snyk Test Results (Before Fix)' and 'Post-Fix Validation'
No error_code or error in result
